description: Visual acoustic behavior profiles for respiratory cough classes. Used for waveform interpretation, visual comparison explanation, and acoustic fingerprint understanding.

visual_interpretation_rules.higher_value: Greater intensity or prominence in acoustic behavior
visual_interpretation_rules.balanced_pattern: Feature distribution close to healthy baseline
visual_interpretation_rules.irregular_pattern: Uneven feature distribution indicating abnormal acoustic behavior

asthma.waveform_characteristics: Irregular burst-like waveform with moderate amplitude fluctuations
asthma.energy_distribution: Moderate energy concentration with uneven amplitude variation
asthma.spectral_behavior: Elevated mid-frequency components with noticeable variability
asthma.acoustic_pattern: Intermittent bursts and unstable breathing-related acoustic events

feature_visual_behavior.rms_std: Variable energy distribution across cough segments

visual_comparison_notes.vs_healthy: Shows higher irregularity and energy variability than healthy cough
visual_comparison_notes.vs_pneumonia: Lower sustained energy compared to pneumonia
visual_comparison_notes.vs_copd: Less uniform energy spread than COPD

asthma.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern shows uneven spikes across energy and spectral features.

bronchial.waveform_characteristics: Frequent short bursts with rapid oscillations
bronchial.fingerprint_description: Radar shape shows elevated frequency-based features with moderate energy.

copd.waveform_characteristics: Broad waveform with sustained amplitude segments
copd.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern appears wide and distributed across multiple features.

pneumonia.waveform_characteristics: Strong sustained waveform with high amplitude

visual_comparison_notes.vs_healthy: Much higher amplitude and energy concentration

pneumonia.fingerprint_description: Radar shape shows strong spikes in energy and spectral features.

visual_comparison_notes.vs_disease_classes: More uniform and stable acoustic pattern

healthy.fingerprint_description: Radar pattern appears balanced and symmetric.

visualization_summary_template: This visualization compares your cough acoustic profile with disease patterns to highlight similarities and deviations across key acoustic features.
